name: ana-hr-operations
description: Human-approved HR operations, four-person team adoption, template quality, research library, and approval-gated content for Ana's HR company.

interface.shortDescription: Run Ana's human-approved HR operating system.
interface.longDescription: Execute named SOPs for four-person team control, client delivery, template-preserving Google Docs/Canva work, recruiting, offers, invoice drafts, research curation, and approval-gated content.
defaultPrompt: Run Ana's manager morning control and approval queue.
Run the 20–30 minute first-client-call SOP with a template route.
Create a source-backed content pack for Ana's approved offer or invoice master.
